rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Elec. Code §253.093, which governs which associations are treated as corporations for election law purposes.
quote: For purposes of this subchapter, the following associations, whether incorporated or not, are considered to be corporations covered by this subchapter
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns election-law corporate status, unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
